failed_assumptions: H2 cross-model validation blocked by gated model access
candidates.notes: UAD replicates Iteration 1 results (F1=0.704) on GPT-2 Small layer 8. Cross-layer validation shows consistent detection (mean F1=0.56, layers 4/8/10). DFDA achieves 100% improvement on 2/2 pairs with 386 params. Cross-model validation (Gemma-2B, Pythia-2.8B) blocked by gated model access and missing pretrained SAEs. Recommendation: proceed with GPT-2 Small as primary model, add multi-seed robustness as validation.

p2_dfda_gpt2.caveat: 100% improvement is suspiciously high - baseline MSE is high because parent values are near-zero when child fires alone. Need more rigorous evaluation with reconstruction MSE.

p3_uad_cross_layer.caveat: Layer 4 F1=0.43 slightly below 0.45 threshold. Cross-model validation (Gemma-2B, Pythia-2.8B) blocked by gated access / missing SAEs.

risks_identified: Cross-model validation blocked: Gemma-2B gated on HuggingFace, no HF token configured. Pythia-2.8B SAE not available in SAELens.
DFDA 100% improvement is artifact of near-zero parent values in child-dominant positions. Need reconstruction MSE validation.
Only 2/4 DFDA pairs had sufficient training data. Need better pair selection criteria.
recommendations: Proceed with cand_a (UAD+DFDA) as primary contribution
Use GPT-2 Small multi-layer + multi-seed as validation proxy for cross-model
Add reconstruction MSE check to DFDA evaluation
Consider training custom SAE on GPT-2 Medium if time permits for true cross-scale validation
For full experiments: implement proper Chanin protocol for true absorption ground truth
